headline: Realty Income (O) Stock After Recent Interest Rate Jitters Is The Price Now Attractive
summary: If you are wondering whether Realty Income is trading at a fair price today, the key question is how its current share price stacks up against different measures of underlying value. The stock recently closed at US$60.24, with returns of 5.1% year to date and 9.0% over the past year. The price has declined 3.1% over the last week and 2.9% over the last month, which may signal shifting views on its risk and return profile.
